aboutUs.missionQuote: Nobody should waste money on a coupon that doesn't work.
aboutUs.missionParagraph1: We started Couponchy because we kept getting burned — coupon code after coupon code failing at checkout. The problem wasn't a lack of deals. The problem was a lack of honesty.
aboutUs.missionParagraph2: So we built a real-time verification engine. Not just a database of codes — an automated system that actually tests them, removes the dead ones, and surfaces the ones that genuinely save you money.
aboutUs.promiseDescription: Every coupon you see on Couponchy has been verified by our automated system. If it stopped working — it's already gone.
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Browse our verified stores and start saving on every order — with codes that actually work.
aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: The smarter way to save.
aboutUs.content: Couponchy is a coupon and deal aggregation platform helping shoppers save money across top online stores. We curate, verify, and update thousands of discount codes and offers daily so you never miss a saving.
aboutUs.mission: Our mission is to make smart shopping accessible to everyone, everywhere.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you.
contactUs.formNote: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.content:
Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us for support.

We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send you technical notices and support messages, and respond to your comments and questions.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.content:
By accessing or using Couponchy, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read these terms carefully before using our service.

Couponchy provides a coupon and deal aggregation service. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or availability of any coupon codes or deals listed on our platform.

You agree not to misuse our services or attempt to access them using a method other than the interface and instructions we provide.
